feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to get the cancellation date for an invoice in VBRK?
entry.content:
Hi all,

How can I get the cancellation date when an invoice in VBRK is cancelled (FKSTO='X')?

TIA,

Luis Rodriguez

entry.title: I got error when adding stock in MB1C. Acc. 2000000000 trans./event key BSX, postable directly.
entry.content: Hi, There is an issue when i try to save the Material Stock through MB1C. I got the error message is Acc. 2000000000 trans./event key BSX, postable directly. Hence unable to add the stock. Kindly assist me to resolve it.

entry.title: Vendor Payment Process After Item Is Sold
entry.content: We are exploring a vendor payment process based on the sale of items and need clarification on whether SAP supports this scenario natively. In our process, the stock is owned by our company upon receipt into our warehouses or stores, but payment to the vendor is triggered only after the stock is sold to the end customer. At the end of the month, the invoice is cleared, and payment is made to the vendor based on the number of sales. If such a solution exists, could you please provide guidance on its implementation or configuration? If not, are there any recommendations or best practices for addressing this scenario through enhancements?

entry.title: "Runtime error - Description of Exception". When posting PGI from VL02N
entry.content:
Delivery is created and when doing PGI, i got runtime error - description of exception. can someone please help me to resolve this issue to do the PGI.
Error Screenshot:

entry.title: Delivery Output Determination in shipment document missing
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have an issue regards the output determination in the shipment document.

Pratically, When I create the shipment document the system automatically link the output message type to the shipment. The problem is that when I link the delivery document to the shipment, the output message type of the Ship-to automatically disappear.

Can anyone help me? Maybe I miss something or I don't know.

Thanks

Bye

entry.title: Unable to fetch KBETR field in price condition using formula routine
entry.content:
We have (zppt price per )tonne which is header condition type also we have ZB00 is base price item condition, we will enter manually zppt price at header and we have to calculate base price condition amount in KBETR ,we have created 918 condition value formula routine , we unable fetch zb00 condition rate in KBETR field, we are getting calculated XKWERT field i.e condition value, unable fetch KBETR, please suggest solution.

data : lt_pack TYPE TABLE OF zpack, wa_pack TYPE zpack.

data : lt_marm TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF marm, wa_marm type marm.

data : lt_marm1 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF marm, wa_marm1 type marm.

data : lt_prcd TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF prcd_elements, wa_prcd type prcd_elements.

*DATA : ZB001 TYPE p DECIMALS 3.

DATA : ZB001 TYPE decfloat34.

DATA : ZB002 TYPE KWERT.

DATA : ZB003 TYPE KWERT.

data : lv_conversion TYPE f.

SELECT * FROM zpack INTO TABLE lt_pack WHERE matnr = komp-matnr and WERKS = komp-werks and meins = komp-meins.

SORT lt_pack DESCENDING by edate. SELECT * FROM marm INTO TABLE lt_marm where matnr = komp-matnr and meinh = 'TO'.

SELECT * from prcd_elements into table lt_prcd where knumv = komk-knumv and kschl = 'ZPPT'.

READ TABLE lt_marm into wa_marm INDEX 1. READ TABLE lt_pack into wa_pack INDEX 1. READ TABLE lt_prcd into wa_prcd with key kschl = 'ZPPT' kposn = komp-kposn.

ZB001 = ( wa_marm-umren / wa_marm-umrez ) .

IF KOMV-KSCHL = 'ZPPT'.

ZB002 = ZB001 * KOMV-KBETR .

ZB003 = ZB002 + wa_pack-rate.

xkwert = ZB003 * KOMP-MGAME / 1000 . ELSEIF

KOMV-KSCHL = 'ZB00'.

ZB002 = KOMV-kbetr.

xkwert = ZB002 * KOMP-MGAME / 1000 . ENDIF.

*ZB003 = ZB002 + wa_pack-rate.

xkwert = ZB003 KOMP-MGAME / 1000     above code is written in condition value formula routine

entry.title: VA22, update technical objects for multiple line items
entry.content: Hi, I can update functional location once per line. How to update the functional location for all the line items at once?

entry.title: Credit Management: Is there a TCode for orders released but not invoiced yet?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

As inquired in the topic 😎, I am looking for a TCode where I can list orders released but not yet invoiced, is there a single Tcode which will allow to pull the report, or we need to 2 or more TCodes for this task requiring a kind of reports reconciliation 🤔.

Would appreciate your assistance 😃💪.

Best regards,

Piotr

entry.title: Fixing pricing date by customer in Sales Order
entry.content:
Good morning,

I would like to inquire if there is a way to set a fixed pricing date for sales orders.

Specifically, starting from January 1st, 2025, when a price increase will take effect, we would like to apply automatically the old prices for some customers by using a pricing date of December 15th, 2024.

Is there a transaction in SAP where this can be configured?

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: F2100 Error
entry.content:
Hi,

The standard BP partner function in IOC1 is been deleted some how, as a result while creating new customer i am getting the error as , "In table TPAER, the entry IOC1 SH is missing Message no. F2100" .

I tried to Configure this error by following this process (Transaction SM30, enter table TPAER, click Customizing and it will take you to the IMG) but I don’t know what would be the next step. In IMG screen can any please help me solve this error with proper step's by step process. 

so is there any way of adding that deleted SH partner function in to the system.

Thanks & Regards, 

MOHSIN

entry.title: Can user define custom header/item condition in Sales Order instead of HM00/PN00 ?
entry.content:
Hello Colleague, Can user define custom header/item condition in Sales Order instead of HM00/PN00 ?

 

Regards, Ravi

entry.title: What is the difference between "Sales Deal & Promotions" and regular condition record discount?
entry.content:
Hello Guys,

My question is, What is the difference between "Sales Deal & Promotions" and regular condition record for discount?

As I understand Sales Deals are being tracked by condition records too. We can simply create a discount by creation condition record for particular product/product line. So why do we need to create a Sales Promotion&Deal instead of just creating a discount from VK11?

What is the efficiency of this?

entry.title: Advanced intercompany Sales - IC Supplier Invoice not created due to error on Monitor Value Chains
entry.content:
Hello Dears,

I face an error on Monitor Value Chains while creating intercompany supplier invoice (Advanced intercompany sales) 

 

 Note: Document 60000259 is intercompany sales order and it exists and I can open it normally.

entry.title: How to keep the same cost in Sales order and return order
entry.content:
We need  help with below scenario

our material price control is V, How to keep the same cost in Sales order and return order

entry.title: Condition origin "D" in Sales Order
entry.content:
Dear Guru's,

I'm trying to figure out a scenario:  to create a header condition with fixed value(negative) which means such a coupon discount for the order. And hope the value can be distributed to multiple order items. For that, I've created a condition type with "header condition" only,  and set up in pricing procedure.

But, the issue is when i'm going into order creation, the condition type Origin is always = "E" item total.  Suppose it should be "D" header condition... Could anyone help here?  

thanks,

entry.title: S4HANA Variant Configuration SD Settings
entry.content:
Hello All, 

I would like to know Variant Configuration SD Functional settings and Integration settings.  Hope we can use Variant Configuration MTS and MTO.

 Make to stockMake to order
General Item category group00020002
Material Master -  Item category group

ERLA or 0002

LUMF or 0004

Sale order item category determination VOV4ERLA or 0002

LUMF or 0004

Delivery item category determination 0184ERLA or 0002

LUMF or 0004

Pricing at Header Item category VOV7Don't knowDon't know
Pricing at Line item Item category VOV7Don't knowDon't know
User of Class type300 or 200300 or 200
Strategy group 25 or 2625 or 26

Which Functional consultant is responsible for below 

Create characteristics T-Code CT04

Creation of dependency source code

Create Class T-Code CL01

Create configuration profile CU41

Variant Tables & Variant Function

Dependency nets T-Code CU21

Routing T-Code CA01

Create dependency T-Code CU01

Regards

entry.content:
Dear all,

I have a Sales Area assigned:

When trying to assign Sales Document Types Permitted for Sales Areas, I get this error:

I am not able to understand what is the issue.
Thank you in advance,
Gabriel

entry.title: Unable to do either GR or reverse PGI in STO PO
entry.content:
Unable to either GR or reverse PGI in STO PO

 

        Following is the detailed step :

 

  1. Created an INTRA STO using ME21n.
  2. Created the replenishment delivery using VL10B.
  3. Created the PGI using VL02N.
  4. Created an STO Proforma Invoice for the same.
  5. In MB5T, system shows me the Stock in Transit. NO GR done till now.
  6. Now, due to mismatch in valuation type in delivery document and STO PO , we are unable to do GR system giving error message   M7043 : Cannot GR Stock Transport Order - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA.
  7. We tried to  GR  by changing batch valuation type still system giving same error .
  8. So we wants to reverse the PGI in VL09  and cancel the delivery document.
  9. Tried to reverse PGI in VL09, system giving error: Message VB610: No data available for these selection criteria.
  10. We have cancel the Proforma Invoice, Now the proforma invoice is showing as cancelled in the document flow.
  11. Again, we tried to reverse PGI in VL09, still system giving error “Message VB610: No data available for these selection criteria.”  We checked in VL09 by removing the selection criteria, there is no delivery number available for Intra STO .

 

             STO PO: 5500023709      Delivery document No: 4020027694

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Error Reverse PGI In VL09:

 

 

thanks ,

Shital

entry.title: Number range for trans./event type WL in year 2025 does not exist
entry.content:
Number range for trans./event type WL in year 2025 does not exist

During PGI in Delivery Page, This error message is poping up. How to resolve it.

entry.title: Billing from plant 1001 and shipping from plant 1105
entry.content: Dear All,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   we have two plants in under one company code we do STO Po from  plant 1001 to 1105 under same company code if material is damaged we return back material  to plant 1001 , instead of return back we want scrape sales of that material from 1105 plant , but we want billing from 1001 plant is this possible , how to configure.                                                                                                                                                                                                     Thanks and regards                                                                                                                                                    shital
